name: Garden Turkey & Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cooked turkey breast, cut into bite size pieces
1/2 cup fat free Italian salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first eight ingredients in a medium bowl.
2. In a separate container, mix together the Italian dressing and lemon juice.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad and mix well.
4. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Makes 3 servings.
